RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KINDRED NURSING CENTERS WEST, L.L.C'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REBUTTING DEFENDANT'S SHOWING THAT HER LEAVE HAD EXPIRED WITHOUT HER RETURNING TO WORK AND THAT SHE WAS TERMINATED ON THAT BASIS. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO READ C R C 2.104-2.110. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB
